channel.title: Boss Kev Curated Newsfeed
channel.description: Curated Malaysia, global, tech, and health headlines ranked by freshness and interest.

item.title: Malaysia Is Running Out Of Caregivers And Time — Rashidi Yahaya
item.description:
Source: CodeBlue (Malaysia Health)
Malaysia requires a long-term care insurance framework that spreads risk across the population and creates a sustainable financing pool, built before the demographic wave hits full force, not after. The post Malaysia Is Running Out Of Caregivers And Time — Rashidi Yahaya appeared first on CodeBlue .
Matched: breaking(+3), urgent(+3), policy(+3), budget(+3), law(+3), parliament(+2), ministry(+2), war(+3), economy(+2), ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: China poised to trim growth ambitions, pursue timid rebalancing efforts
item.description:
Source: FMT Business (Finance)
China's National People's Congress begins on March 5 with Beijing expected to set 2026 growth at 4.5–5%.
Matched: policy(+3), budget(+3), parliament(+2), court(+2), war(+3), economy(+2), ai(+3), who(+2)

item.description:

item.title: LIAM Alleges Average Medical Insurance Claim Only RM12,000
item.description:
Source: CodeBlue (Malaysia Health)
In defending the RM100k annual limit under the Base MHIT plan, LIAM claims that the average medical claim is only RM12,000, even though many ITOs in the insurance industry regularly tout policies with RM1m or higher annual limits for medical emergencies. The post LIAM Alleges Average Medical Insurance Claim Only RM12,000 appeared first on CodeBlue .
Matched: policy(+3), war(+3), ai(+3), dengue(+3)

item.title: Health PSSC Moots Expansion Of Insurance Coverage For Mental Health Services
item.description:
Source: CodeBlue (Malaysia Health)
The Health PSSC recommends expanding insurance coverage for mental health services, warning that limited coverage is pushing patients to pay out of pocket and straining public hospitals. Preventive care remains largely excluded from insurance. The post Health PSSC Moots Expansion Of Insurance Coverage For Mental Health Services appeared first on CodeBlue .
Matched: parliament(+2), ministry(+2), war(+3), ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: When Bariatric Surgery is Dismissed As ‘Cosmetic’: What We Are Missing
item.description:
Source: CodeBlue (Malaysia Health)
Bariatric surgery is often dismissed as “cosmetic”, but it is a medical intervention for severe obesity and metabolic disease. It drives significant weight loss, reduces metabolic comorbidities like diabetes and hypertension, and improves quality of life. The post When Bariatric Surgery is Dismissed As ‘Cosmetic’: What We Are Missing appeared first on CodeBlue .
Matched: policy(+3), ai(+3), who(+2), diabetes(+2)

item.title: Over Half Of Hospital Patients At Risk Of Disease-Related Malnutrition, Say Dietitians
item.description:
Source: CodeBlue (Malaysia Health)
The Malaysian Dietitians’ Association says over half of hospital patients – and up to 70% among cancer patients – are at risk of disease-related malnutrition, doubling readmission risk and raising costs by 20-30%. Medical nutrition therapy is not covered by insurance. The post Over Half Of Hospital Patients At Risk Of Disease-Related Malnutrition, Say Dietitians appeared first on CodeBlue .
Matched: parliament(+2), ai(+3), who(+2), cancer(+2)
